arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda urges 'tired' Celtic to ditch Dortmund hangover and dominate in Dingwall
arts.sum: Maeda feels the fans are owed a performance in the Highlands after their Champions League capitulation

arts.ttl: Luis Palma snub theory emerges as Celtic winger given 'break' while £8.3m transfer successor 'expectations' emerge
arts.sum: The winger will be hoping for a return to Brendan Rodgers' squad against St Johnstone

arts.ttl: Ross County boss Don Cowie has travelling Celtic fans in mind with reveal of Sunday's gameplan
arts.sum: Celtic’s match against Ross County on Sunday is a welcome chance for the Bhoys to enter the international break on a high. Don Cowie shares Ross County plan for Celtic visit

arts.ttl: Ruthless Brendan Rodgers cuts 5 players as £16m worth of talent OUT after Dortmund – How Celtic line up for Ross County
arts.sum: The Parkhead boss has some big calls to make following the 7-1 mauling in Dortmund

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton cites Arsenal example as argument for what Brendan Rodgers must do at Celtic now
arts.sum: Former striker Chris Sutton reckons it’s less about how Celtic set up in the game from the start and, citing Arsenal, more about adaptability within the match when periods of play develop. Chris Sutton weighs into Celtic Champions League debate

arts.ttl: Celtic history could be made vs Ross County on Sunday
arts.sum: Don Cowie’s side are hardly in towering form, with just one league win from seven, but Ross County players have already vowed to make it a difficult physical match for Celtic . Now, the team has the chance to go one step further and make history with seven wins and seven clean sheets from the first seven league matche s.

arts.ttl: 8 forgotten Celtic paydays that can add to £40m Champions League bonanza and leave Parkhead coffers bulging
arts.sum: The cash is flowing at Celtic Park from the European campaign but there is more on the way

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin responds to Alan Shearer's comments about Aberdeen being 'serious' challengers to Celtic
arts.sum: One of the stories of the season so far is Aberdeen’s ability to keep pace with Celtic at the top end of the Scottish Premiership table. We can only focus on being better and trying to play the games and now what is happening in May. It is so far away.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Celtic to Become Adidas Elite Team
arts.sum: Another team that Footy Headlines can confirm will become an Adidas elite club from the 25-26 season is Celtic.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers’ detailed Dortmund analysis doesn’t wash with Celtic fans as ‘great insight’ dismissed by punters
arts.sum: The Hoops boss spoke in his media brief ahead of facing Ross County as he looked back to key moments in Germany
